hero.name: Appala Nithin
hero.title: Business Analyst | Data & Process Analysis
hero.pitch: Fresher Business Analyst with a B.Tech in Data Science, skilled in requirements gathering, BRD/FRD documentation, SQL-based reporting, and UAT. Proven ability to translate ambiguous business needs into structured documentation and data-driven insights.

about.summary: Fresher Business Analyst with a B.Tech in Data Science, skilled in requirements gathering, BRD/FRD documentation, SQL-based reporting, and UAT — built through internship experience and a live, self-built product with real users. Proven ability to translate ambiguous business needs into structured documentation and data-driven insights (SQL, Excel, Power BI). Seeking a Business Analyst / Analytics role in IT services, consulting, or product-based organizations — with a strong interest in client-facing process consulting and data-driven storytelling.

description: Assisted in gathering and documenting business requirements for a CRM migration project.
Created process flow diagrams and AS-IS/TO-BE models.
Collaborated with developers and QA to ensure requirements were understood and tested.

projects.title: Takevolet — PropTech P2P Rental Platform
projects.description: Live on Google Play Store. Owned end-to-end BA for a live product with real users.
bullets: Authored 30+ business requirements (BRDs, FRDs, User Stories, RTM, Process Flow Diagrams) across 5 modules.
Designed SIPOC and As-Is/To-Be maps for 5 workflows.
Prioritized 25+ features using MoSCoW and managed Agile backlog.
Built SQL/Excel/Power BI dashboards tracking 10+ KPIs, supported a 3-tier monetization model.

projects.title: Business Process Analysis — E-Commerce Order Fulfillment
projects.description: Comprehensive process analysis for an e-commerce order fulfillment system.
bullets: Conducted As-Is/To-Be analysis to identify bottlenecks.
Created BRD, SIPOC, and stakeholder impact assessment.
